prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年约5321名→2023年约4472名→2024年约4759名→2025年约4745名，近三年位次在4472-4759区间窄幅波动，2025年基准位次约4745名，整体呈高位稳定态势。 2022-2023年计划110人，2024-2025年降至109人，2026年扩至120人，较2025年增加11人（+10.1%），扩招幅度较大，理论上缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第54→2022年第62→2023年第57→2024年第63→2025年第60→2026年第50名，2026年首次进入前50，排名显著提升，对高 分考生吸引力增强；2026年声誉文件中未出现北邮负面舆情，整体声誉平稳；抖音热度总排名第64位（评价"一般"），短视频曝光量中等，未见异常报考信号；近年无投档断档记录；信息与通信工程A+（全国顶尖）、计算机科学与技术A、电子科学与技术A-、网络空间安全A-、软件工程A-、光学工程A-，共6个A-及以上 学科，信息通信领域实力突出，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业2024-2026年持续高热推荐，社会关注度极高；四川省2026年高考 总人数535,000人，较2025年（物理类284,789+历史类177,978=462,767）大幅增加约15.6%，按历史比例估算物理类约329,000人，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次4745名、2026年扩招10.1%、软科排名跃升至前50（吸引更多高分考生）、本省物理类考生增加约15.6%（竞争加剧）以及 信息通信类专业持续高热等因素，扩招的缓解效应被排名提升和考生增加部分抵消，预计2026年最低录取位次较。预测最低位次约4982名，区间4482-5482名。

一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（元班）（含计算机科学与技术、网络空间安全、具身智能）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、网络工程、数据科学与大数据技术）
- 通信工程（大类招生）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:

- 电子信息类（含电子科学与技术、电子信息科学与技术、光电信息科学与工程、集成电路设计与集成系统）
- 人工智能（大类招生）
- 网络空间安全（大类招生）
- 软件工程
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（4482-5482名）内，建议以二档电子信息类、人工智能、网络空间安全为主攻方向，一档计算机类（元班）和通信工程作为冲刺，三档自动化类、智能交互设计 作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<4482名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。北邮信息通信类学科实力突出，相关专业就业前景广阔，建议优先选择与A+学科直接关联的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Approximately 5321st in 2022 → 4472nd in 2023 → 4759th in 2024 → 4745th in 2025, with rankings fluctuating narrowly between 4472 and 4759 in the past three years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 4745th, showing a high-level stable trend. The enrollment plan was 110 students in 2022-2023, reduced to 109 in 2024-2025, and expanded to 120 in 2026, an increase of 11 students (+10.1%) compared to 2025. The expansion is relatively large, theoretically easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 54th in 2021 → 62nd in 2022 → 57th in 2023 → 63rd in 2024 → 60th in 2025 → 50th in 2026 in the Soft Science China University Rankings, entering the top 50 for the first time in 2026, with a significant ranking improvement, enhancing appeal to high-scoring students. No negative public opinion about BUPT appeared in the 2026 reputation document, with overall reputation stable. Douyin popularity total ranking 64th (rated 'average'), with moderate short video exposure and no abnormal application signals. No record of admission gaps in recent years. Disciplines: Information and Communication Engineering A+ (top in China), Computer Science and Technology A, Electronic Science and Technology A-, Cyberspace Security A-, Software Engineering A-, Optical Engineering A-, totaling 6 disciplines rated A- or above, with outstanding strength in information and communication fields, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication majors have been highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, with extremely high social attention. The total number of Sichuan Province Gaokao examinees in 2026 is 535,000, a significant increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025 (Physics Category 284,789 + History Category 177,978 = 462,767). Estimated Physics Category examinees about 329,000 based on historical proportions, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4745th, the 10.1% enrollment expansion in 2026, the Soft Science ranking leap into the top 50 (attracting more high-scoring students), the approximately 15.6% increase in local Physics Category examinees (intensifying competition), and the sustained high popularity of information and communication majors, the easing effect of the expansion is partially offset by the ranking improvement and increased examinees. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 4982nd, with a range of 4482nd to 5482nd.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Class (Yuan Class) (including Computer Science and Technology, Cyberspace Security, Embodied Intelligence)
- Computer Class (including Computer Science and Technology, Network Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Communication Engineering (Major Category Enrollment)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information Class (including Electronic Science and Technology, Electronic Information Science and Technology, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Integrated Circuit Design and Integration System)
- Artificial Intelligence (Major Category Enrollment)
- Cyberspace Security (Major Category Enrollment)
- Software Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Automation Class (Intelligent Robots) (including Automation, Robot Engineering, Mechanical Engineering)
- Intelligent Interaction Design
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Information Computing) (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- Ethnic Minority Preparatory Course
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range (4482nd to 5482nd), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors such as Electronic Information Class, Artificial Intelligence, and Cyberspace Security as main targets, with Tier 1 Computer Class (Yuan Class) and Communication Engineering as reach goals, and Tier 3 Automation Class and Intelligent Interaction Design as safety options. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<4482nd), prioritize reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors. BUPT has outstanding strength in information and communication disciplines, with broad employment prospects for related majors. It is recommended to prioritize majors directly associated with A+ disciplines.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Approximately 2212th in 2022 → 3030th in 2023 → 2884th in 2024 → 2397th in 2025, with significant fluctuations; rankings notably dropped in 2023 then gradually recovered in 2024-2025, with a baseline ranking of about 2397th in 2025; enrollment plan was 13 in 2022, 12 in 2023-2025, and remains 12 in 2026, stable for four consecutive years.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; Soft Science ranking jumped to 50th in 2026, entering the top 50 for the first time, enhancing overall university level and indirectly boosting liberal arts applicants' willingness; reputation stable in 2026 with no negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranked 64th overall (rated 'average'), no abnormal application signals; BUPT's strengths are in information and communication fields, liberal arts majors (Law, English, Business Administration, Network and New Media) lack direct A-class discipline support, but Network and New Media can be linked to information communication direction.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major is socially popular (recommended), Network and New Media belongs to Journalism and Communication category (clearly discouraged), Business Administration (clearly discouraged), English (foreign language category generally wait-and-see); total number of Sichuan Gaokao examinees in 2026 is 535,000, significantly increased from 2025, estimated History Category about 206,000 based on historical proportion, an increase of about 15.8% from 177,978 in 2025, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2397th, enrollment plan stable for four consecutive years, a 15.8% increase in local History Category examinees (intensified competition), BUPT's Soft Science ranking jumping into top 50 (enhanced overall appeal), and divergence in liberal arts major popularity, under the scenario of unchanged plan but significantly increased examinees, the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to slightly move forward compared to 2025. Predicted minimum ranking approximately 2367th, range 2012-2722nd.
